chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Ist Appeal No. 21 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 711/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.14. 3. For orders on CMA 712/2025. 4. For orders on CMA 713/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025. Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for appellants. = Urgency allowed however, learned counsel in response to the office objection contents that though the impugned order has been passed by Banking Court at Mirpurkhas on account of decree having been granted by the Banking Court at Hyderabad to which Appeal No.6/2015 has since been filed by the present appellants and is pending before this Court, this appeal has been filed before this Court however, the same may be ordered to be returned and presented before the proper Court. Ordered accordingly. Let these proceedings be returned for presentation before the proper Court in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
